# Karpathy's LLM Wiki Architecture

## Summary
A pattern where the LLM owns the wiki layer and humans curate sources. Raw captures get digested into structured knowledge pages by the model. Described in Andrej Karpathy's public talks on LLM-native tooling.

## Relevance
This pattern directly inspired Project Alpha's recent pivot toward structured knowledge capture.
